final:
module sync_binary_counter (
	input clk,
	input enable,
	input reset,
	output reg [3:0] count);always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (reset) begin
		count <= 4'b0000;
	end else if (enable) begin
		count <= count + 4'b0001;
	end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 4'b0001;
    end
  end

endmodule
